MINI MINUTES: Line 5
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner LLC is present. Represented by elizabeth Kershaw
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Webb is present.
Attorney Carolyn Gold appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of March 13, 2017 is vacated. (501)
